Title: Machine Learning Engineer (Semantic Scene Understanding)
Description:
About Us

Harmattan AI is a next-generation defense prime building autonomous and scalable defense systems. Following the close of a $200M Series B, valuing the company at $1.4 billion, we are expanding our teams and capabilities to deliver mission-critical systems to allied forces.

Our work is guided by clear values: building technologies with real-world impact, pursuing excellence in everything we do, setting ambitious goals, and taking on the hardest technical challenges. We operate in a demanding environment where rigor, ownership, and execution are expected.

About The Role

We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to join our Semantic Scene Understanding team in Paris. In this role, you will design the core algorithms to extract semantic information in real-time from the theatre of operations as seen through the different cameras of our different UAVs, to improve the operator’s scene understanding.

Responsibilities


Design and Train: Develop state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms for semantic segmentation, object detection, and classification tailored to aerial imagery.
Advanced Feature Extraction: Build high-level tactical features on top of base semantic data, such as real-time road vectorization, trafficability analysis, and dynamic obstacle mapping.
Multi-Agent Fusion: Architect pipelines that temporally and spatially align semantic data from multiple moving UAVs into a cohesive Common Operational Picture (COP).
Edge Optimization: Optimize and deploy these algorithms directly into our tactical C2 platform, utilizing quantization, pruning, and hardware acceleration to meet strict real-time compute constraints.


Candidate Requirements


Educational Background: MSc in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related field. A PhD is a strong plus.
Foundational Knowledge: Deep understanding of Machine Learning theory, Linear Algebra, and 3D-Geometry algorithms.
Core Tech Stack: Expert-level command of Python and deep learning frameworks (PyTorch).
Performance Engineering: Experience with C++ and inference optimization frameworks (e.g., TensorRT, ONNX Runtime, CUDA) is highly desirable.
Domain Experience (Plus): A track record of shipping CV/ML algorithms in production, particularly for edge/embedded systems or involving aerial (EO/IR) imagery.
Strong Ownership: Ability to take a feature from an ArXiv paper all the way to a ruggedized tactical PC.
Adaptability & Mission Focus: Thrives in a fast-paced startup environment and is 100% dedicated to building ethical defense technologies that bring a strategic edge to allied nations.


Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to collaborate effectively with software engineers and hardware teams.

We look forward to hearing how you can help shape the future of autonomous defense systems at Harmattan AI.

Title: AI Research Scientist/Engineer
Description:
Who is Sonar?

Sonar is driving the future of agent-centric software development. As the leader in AI code verification and governance, we solve a critical problem: ensuring that software generated by AI-assisted developers or autonomous agents is reliable, secure, and maintainable.

Integrating seamlessly with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, and Devin, we help over 75% of the Fortune 100 build trusted, reliable, compliant software. Customers who use Sonar are 44% less likely to report an outage due to AI-generated code.

We believe code verification is the critical missing link in the Agent-Centric Development Cycle (AC/DC). Industry giants like Nvidia, ServiceNow,Booking.com, Goldman Sachs, AstraZeneca, and Ford Motor Company count on us to provide independent, explainable, consistent review and governance of their AI-generated code via products like:


SonarQube: The world’s leading AI code review and verification platform.
SonarQube Foundation Agent: Currently topping the leaderboards for agentic software repair.
SonarSweep & Sonar Context Augmentation: Providing the enterprise-grade context and constraints agents need to be truly effective.


Our team operates across global hubs in Austin, Bochum, Dubai, Geneva, London, Singapore, Tokyo, and Washington D.C. We move with a mindset we call CODE:


Committed to our customers and community.
Obsessed with quality.
Deliberate in our decisions.
Effective as one team.


With over $400M in revenue and profitable, fast-paced growth, we are building the backbone of the AI software revolution. If you’re hungry to have an impact, want to build at a fast pace, and ready to work at the forefront of AI, we want to hear from you.

Position description

At Sonar, we are seeking an innovative Research Engineer to join our Data & Agentic team and pioneer the next generation of our code analysis engine. You will be at the forefront of applying cutting-edge AI, Large Language Model (LLM) and agentic techniques to the complex domain of source code. Your work will directly shape our products, pushing the boundaries of static analysis to help millions of developers write better, more secure code. If you are driven to solve real-world problems by turning state-of-the-art research into practical, high-impact solutions, this is the role for you.

What You Will Do


Create & Innovate: Actively participate in the conceptualization phase. Brainstorm novel ways to improve our products and provide immediate, practical feedback to steer exploratory research toward paths that are both impactful and engineering-feasible.
Develop Advanced AI Models: Design, prototype, and validate novel ML models that identify and resolve complex bugs, vulnerabilities, and code smells, going beyond the capabilities of traditional static analysis.
Develop Pragmatic Prototypes: Build hands-on prototypes that prove the viability and scalability of research concepts. Proactively identify engineering bottlenecks or scalability limits and propose effective mitigations early in the research phase.
Evaluate & Benchmark: Drive the rigorous evaluation of new AI-powered features. Construct high-quality datasets, define relevant success metrics, and implement comprehensive benchmarks leveraging Sonar’s existing IP alongside third-party and open-source AI tools.
Engineer Data Pipelines: Build and manage robust data pipelines to gather, process, and version massive code-centric datasets required for training and evaluating specialized models at scale.
Translate Prototypes to Products: Collaborate closely with engineering and product teams to integrate successful AI prototypes into Sonar's cutting-edge products, ensuring they meet the needs of our global user base.
Communicate and Evangelize: Clearly articulate and document complex technical concepts and research findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.


Experience And Qualifications


Strong industry experience in AI and a solid understanding of modern software engineering practices and tools, with minimum 2 years experience in industry.
Exceptional programming skills in Python (other programming languages such as Java is a strong plus), and the ability to write clean, well-documented code for product integration.
Practical experience working with modern AI/ML frameworks, LLMs, and integrating third-party or open-source AI tools into functional prototypes.
Proven experience in data handling: constructing high-quality datasets, defining objective success metrics, and building robust benchmarks for AI solutions.
Experience with modern LLM architectures and techniques, such as:
Fine-tuning strategies (e.g., LoRA, QLoRA) and advanced prompt engineering.
Building and optimizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines.
Working with vector databases and semantic search.
Experience with large-scale data processing frameworks and cloud infrastructure (e.g. AWS).
Experience of driving research projects from initial ideation to a demonstrable prototype with a high degree of autonomy.
The ability to fast context-switch and maintain momentum across multiple concurrent, fast-moving research topics.
Excellent communication skills in English, with a talent for translating complex research findings into clear, actionable artifacts for product engineering squads.


Additional comments This role is based in Geneva. We are unable to consider candidates unwilling to be in Geneva, but we are willing to relocate the right candidate.

In-office culture

We're intentional about this. We believe the best teams are built in the room together. Three anchor days — Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays — create the collaboration rhythm that makes a hub office worth having.

Candidates need to be genuinely based in the location the role is posted — if that's not where you are today, we're happy to support relocation for the right person.

We value diversity, equity, and inclusion

At Sonar, we believe that our diversity is our strength. We are a global company that values and respects different backgrounds, perspectives, and cultures. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their best. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and welcome all qualified applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

If you need any accommodation, please reach out to us at [email protected] .

All offers of employment at Sonar are contingent upon the results of a comprehensive background check and reference verification conducted before the start date.

Applications that are submitted through agencies or third party recruiters will not be considered.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Machine Learning Training Infrastructure Engineer
Description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.

The Role:

We are seeking an ML Training Infrastructure Engineer to elevate the engineering practices across our Machine Learning and EdgeAI teams and improve their velocity. In this role, you will act as a shared champion of DevOps / MLOps excellence. Your mission is to drive excellent model training by designing the reusable scaffolding (templates, CI/CD pipelines, and data management workflows) that allows our ML engineers to work faster, smarter, and with absolute consistency. A key focus of this role is optimizing training pipelines to fully leverage our High Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructure, ensuring scalability and performance. You are the interface with our Digital Office (who manage core AWS/HPC resources and MLOps infrastructure) and the applied ML teams, ensuring knowledge transfer and engineering best practices are seamlessly integrated.

Your Contribution:

Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. Share our passion for Equality and the Environment. These are the behaviors and values you’ll need for success at Logitech. In this role you will look after:


Infrastructure rollout & onboarding: Lead infrastructure migration and adoption by guiding ML engineers to new shared compute environments, optimizing developer workflows to reduce friction, and providing comprehensive documentation and hands-on training to ensure team upskilling.
Enablement & Knowledge Transfer: Act as the internal consultant and coach for ML teams for High Performance Computing (HPC) optimization. Run workshops, pair-program on pipeline bottlenecks, and document modern MLOps standards to upskill the engineering org and facilitate knowledge sharing.
Standardization & Templating: Design and maintain "cookie-cutter" project templates. Ensure any ML engineer can spin up a new repository that is automatically compliant, structured, and integrated with data/artifact versioning.
CI/CD & Continuous Training (CT): Build and maintain robust automation pipelines. Design the triggers and workflows that automate data validation, model retraining, and evaluation when new data arrives or performance baselines change.
Compute & Code Optimization: Partner with ML engineers to profile and optimize training pipelines and local/edge inference code in pair work, ensuring high efficiency on local host computers and specialized compute resources.
Digital Office Liaison: Act as the primary technical point of contact to translate the Digital Office’s AWS policies, high-efficiency compute setups, and infrastructure realities into practical, developer-friendly workflows for the ML teams. You are the product owner of the MLOps toolchain making sure the requirements of the ML team are implemented as tools by the Digital Office.
AI Governance & Data Stewardship: Establish and enforce frameworks for ethical AI, model transparency (via model cards), and data privacy compliance. Act as the steward of our data ecosystem by aligning processes for data inventory, lifecycle management, and accessibility, ensuring that high-quality, compliant data is readily available for training and inference across all projects.


Key Qualifications:

For consideration, you must bring the following minimum skills and experiences to our team:


Education: PhD or MSc in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a closely related field.
Experience: 5+ years of experience in MLOps, DevOps, or Software Engineering with a heavy focus on developer tooling, automation, platform enablement and pipeline optimization. Hands-on experience designing, building, or maintaining large-scale ML training infrastructure. You have trained ML models on HPC platforms as part of your prior experience and have been acquainted with the different elements of the stack, from data management to driver management.
The "Leadership" Mindset: Proven track record of mentoring teams, establishing best practices, and creating clean documentation that engineers actually enjoy using.
Data & Workflow Tooling: Strong, practical experience with data versioning, experiment tracking tools, and modern CI/CD platforms (e.g., GitLab CI, GitHub Actions).
Software & Packaging Mastery: Deep proficiency in Python and PyTorch, with experience running training workloads on GPUs/TPUs. Strong understanding of containerization (Docker) and packaging models for distribution to edge devices or host computers. Strong software engineering practices: code quality, design reviews, testing, observability, CI/CD.
Familiarity with Infrastructure: Solid understanding of cloud concepts (AWS) to effectively collaborate with the Digital Office, even though cloud deployment is out of scope.
Systems & Performance Optimization: Strong understanding of profiling, operating systems (OS), caching mechanisms, and hardware (HW) architecture. Solid understanding of distributed systems concepts (parallelism strategies, fault tolerance, synchronization).


Across Logitech we empower collaboration and foster play. We help teams collaborate/learn from anywhere, without compromising on productivity or continuity so it should be no surprise that most of our jobs are open to work from home from most locations. Our hybrid work model allows some employees to work remotely while others work on-premises. Within this structure, you may have teams or departments split between working remotely and working in-house.

Logitech is an amazing place to work because it is full of authentic people who are inclusive by nature as well as by design. Being a global company, we value our diversity and celebrate all our differences. Don’t meet every single requirement? Not a problem. If you feel you are the right candidate for the opportunity, we strongly recommend that you apply. We want to meet you!

We offer comprehensive and competitive benefits packages and working environments that are designed to be flexible and help you to care for yourself and your loved ones, now and in the future. We believe that good health means more than getting medical care when you need it. Logitech supports a culture that encourages individuals to achieve good physical, financial, emotional, intellectual and social wellbeing so we all can create, achieve and enjoy more and support our families. We can’t wait to tell you more about them being that there are too many to list here and they vary based on location.

Title: Senior Bioinformatics Developer
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Senior Bioinformatics Developer based in Switzerland.

This role offers the opportunity to develop advanced bioinformatics solutions that contribute to improving genomic analysis and precision medicine.

You will design, build, and optimize scalable pipelines for processing complex genomic data and supporting clinical applications.

The position combines software engineering, computational biology, and data analysis to solve challenging problems in human genetics.

You will work on technologies that bridge scientific research and real-world healthcare applications.

The ideal candidate is a technically skilled professional with strong programming experience, genomic knowledge, and a passion for impactful innovation.

You will collaborate with interdisciplinary teams in a remote environment focused on scientific excellence and continuous learning.

Accountabilities


Build, maintain, and improve pipelines for genomic variant analysis using modern workflow orchestration and pipeline management tools.
Develop scalable, reproducible, and reliable bioinformatics workflows following best practices in data analysis and software engineering.
Design and implement robust tools for analyzing genomic datasets and supporting advanced computational biology applications.
Optimize existing bioinformatics code and pipelines to improve performance, efficiency, and scalability.
Ensure data processing workflows are maintainable, accurate, and suitable for production environments.
Collaborate with scientists, engineers, and interdisciplinary teams to translate biological challenges into effective technical solutions.
Contribute to the continuous improvement of bioinformatics platforms, analysis methods, and development practices.


Requirements


Bachelor’s degree in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, or a related field; advanced degrees are a plus.
Proven experience developing bioinformatics algorithms and building genomic data processing pipelines.
Strong programming skills in Python, with experience using additional scripting languages such as Perl considered an advantage.
Solid understanding of genomics, genetics, molecular biology, and biological data analysis.
Experience working with databases, data management, and data integration techniques.
Familiarity with version control systems such as Git and containerization technologies such as Docker.
Minimum of 4 years of professional experience working in Linux environments.
Strong problem-solving abilities and ability to work effectively in collaborative, interdisciplinary teams.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Ability to independently manage technical challenges while contributing positively to team objectives.


Benefits


Fully remote position with flexibility and occasional team meetings.
Opportunity to work in the healthcare technology and precision medicine space.
Competitive compensation package.
Exposure to cutting-edge bioinformatics, genomic technologies, and clinical applications.
Opportunity to contribute to solutions that connect scientific innovation with real-world healthcare impact.
Collaborative international environment with agile workflows and distributed teams.
Continuous learning opportunities and access to emerging technologies in computational biology.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Data Scientist (Forward Deployed)
Description:
Job Description

Defining how AI and finance work together — securely, intelligently, and at scale.

We at Unique AI are building a highly secure generative AI platform, tailored for the financial sector. Utilizing AI, LLM, agentic and Skills technologies, we aim to revolutionize the Financial industry with an AI Automated workforce. Our mission is to increase efficiency, improve alpha, reduce risk, and increase quality across everything we do. We offer an inclusive environment at Unique and we encourage all genders and all neuro-diversities to apply.




Job Requirements

Experience: 4+ years of experience as a data scientist
Hands-on experience with LLMs: including tool calling and low-level experimentation beyond frameworks, as well as prompt engineering for customer use cases
Proven experience developing and deploying GenAI solutions in production environments; hands-on experience with AI Agents is a plus
History of successfully delivering projects for clients: translating customer requirements into tailored solutions
Exceptional communication and documentation skills: ability to work with technical and business stakeholders, and to communicate clearly when navigating ambiguity
Industry expertise: expertise in financial services environments (private banking, wealth/ asset management, insurance) is a plus
Languages: English (French is a plus)
Education: Master’s or Ph.D. degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, Statistics, or a related field




Job Responsibilities

In this role, you will spend time on-site with clients, enabling them to maximize the value of our platform while providing hands-on support and expertise
You will act as the primary technical point of contact for clients, ensuring smooth integration and adoption of Unique’s GenAI solutions while helping them build AI Agents using our SDK
Additionally, you will collaborate closely with internal product and engineering teams to tailor solutions to client-specific requirements.




Job Benefits

Leading Company 💪 A chance to be part of a leading company in a rapidly evolving industry
Innovative & Impactful Projects 🚀 Engage in groundbreaking projects within the Generative AI space. Contribute towards building the foundations enabling financial institutions to operationalize AI.
Autonomy 🧠 You’ll join an environment of ownership and responsibility, where you're trusted from day 1
Continuous Learning 🔄 Continuously learn and adapt to new technologies and methodologies as you work on varied client projects
Culture 🌿 A modern company with flat hierarchies that focuses on a people-oriented culture and places great emphasis on transparency and open communication
Hybrid set up 🧑 💻🏢 Based in Geneva with flexibility for remote days
Security-first culture 🤝 Develop systems trusted by leading financial institutions.
You will join our internal AI Academy, where you’ll rapidly level up your skills in working with cutting-edge LLM tooling. We are building state-of-the-art agents and reliable AI-driven workflows — and we’ll train you to do the same. By the end of the Academy, you’ll be fully equipped to design, build, and deploy robust AI solutions directly with clients

Title: Senior Artificial Intelligence (AI)/Machine Learning (ML) Engineer, Video (R&D)
Description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.

The role and team:

Logitech is the established market leader in video communication solutions for consumers and enterprise users alike. Building on its strong marketing and engineering heritage, Logitech continues to push the boundaries of technology by investing in advanced video processing and AI/ML capabilities.

The Video AI/ML Technology Development Team spearheads the creation of cutting-edge AI/ML algorithms and video pipelines for edge peripherals and host devices. Delivering unique human and machine vision solutions to Logitech’s webcam business, the team is at the forefront of technology and product innovation. Based at the EPFL Innovation Park, Lausanne (Switzerland), this team works closely with Software and Hardware development teams in North America and Asia.

We are looking for a talented Senior Artificial Intelligence (AI)/Machine Learning (ML) Engineer to join a growing team of Data Engineers, Artificial Intelligence (AI)/Machine Learning(ML) Engineers and Software Developers, responsible for product and technology development in consumer webcams and applications. Following best practices in AI/ML and SW development, you will work in cross-functional teams across software and hardware engineering, program management, product management and design, to efficiently deliver on a product strategy. You will also work closely with Logitech’s Technology Office in developing the technology portfolio for disruptive innovation.

Your Contribution:

Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. Share our passion for Equality and the Environment. These are the behaviors and values you’ll need for success at Logitech. In this role you will:


Develop AI/ML algorithms and video pipelines across the entire model lifecycle: from design to training at scale, optimization, porting and deploying them to (embedded and hosted) target platforms.
Working with a multidisciplinary team, you will champion best practices to turn cutting-edge research into robust and innovative solutions that define the future of human-machine interaction.


Key Qualifications:

For consideration, you must bring the following minimum skills and experiences to our team:


Min. 5–6 years of relevant professional experience in algorithm development (signal processing and AI/ML) with a focus on live video.
Significant industry experience in deploying deep learning models to real-world consumer products.
Hands-on experience with latest AI/ML (Deep Learning) techniques and toolchains from architecture to training, evaluation, optimization, and porting to embedded systems (Linux/Android) and clients (MacOS/Windows).
Experience training and scaling models on distributed computing clusters (e.g., AWS, GCP, or HPC clusters).
Familiarity with data engineering: collection, generation, augmentation, and governance.
Experience with Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) best practices in embedded systems or host clients.
Pragmatic, innovative, curious, and autonomous with a strong ability to communicate technical concepts to cross-functional partners.


Skills:


Design, training, evaluation, and optimization of deep neural networks (CNNs, RNNs, GANs, etc.). Knowledge of Transformers and LLMs is a plus.
Proficiency in deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, or TinyML, as well as ONNX representations.
Knowledge of supervised, unsupervised, and self-supervised learning.
General-purpose programming languages, including Python, C/C++, and C#.
Software development experience on embedded platforms (e.g., ARM) and embedded AI.


Education:


MSc in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Data Science, or a related field.
PhD in a related field is a plus.


Across Logitech we empower collaboration and foster play. We help teams collaborate/learn from anywhere, without compromising on productivity or continuity so it should be no surprise that most of our jobs are open to work from home from most locations. Our hybrid work model allows some employees to work remotely while others work on-premises. Within this structure, you may have teams or departments split between working remotely and working in-house.

Logitech is an amazing place to work because it is full of authentic people who are inclusive by nature as well as by design. Being a global company, we value our diversity and celebrate all our differences. Don’t meet every single requirement? Not a problem. If you feel you are the right candidate for the opportunity, we strongly recommend that you apply. We want to meet you!

We offer comprehensive and competitive benefits packages and working environments that are designed to be flexible and help you to care for yourself and your loved ones, now and in the future. We believe that good health means more than getting medical care when you need it. Logitech supports a culture that encourages individuals to achieve good physical, financial, emotional, intellectual and social wellbeing so we all can create, achieve and enjoy more and support our families. Title: Cloud Data Engineer
Description:
We are recruiting a French speaking Data engineer for one of our customers in Geneva, please apply if your skills are aligned with below job description:




At least 5 years of professional experience in designing, building and operating cloud‑based data solutions.

Proven hands‑on experience with:
Data processing: Spark / PySpark, DuckDB, Python.
Cloud services: AWS (e.g. Glue, S3, Lambda, EMR) or another major cloud provider.

Title: Data Scientist (m/w/d)*
Description:
Über uns

Die Gesundheit der Menschen ist wichtig. SCHOTT Pharma entwickelt Lösungen, die weltweit sichere und einfach anzuwendende Medikamente gewährleisten. Ein Team von 4.700 Mitarbeitern aus über 60 Nationen trägt zur globalen Gesundheitsversorgung bei. Mit 17 Standorten weltweit ist das Unternehmen in Mainz ansässig, an der Frankfurter Börse gelistet und engagiert sich für nachhaltige Entwicklung.

Ihre Aufgaben


Sie analysieren Maschinen- und Prozessdaten zur Verbesserung von Ausbeute (Yield), Prozessstabilität und Qualität
Sie unterstützen datengetrieben bei der Analyse von Prozess- und Qualitätsabweichungen (Root-Cause-Analysen)
Sie begleiten Entwicklungsprojekte mit Statistik, Modellierung und Szenarioanalysen
Sie leisten datengetriebene Beiträge zu Energieoptimierung und CO2-Reduktion
Sie bauen anwendungsnahe KI-Agenten inklusive Tools und Skills und entwickeln Machine-Learning-Modelle für konkrete industrielle Use Cases
Sie präsentieren Ihre Analysen überzeugend und schaffen die Grundlage für datenbasierte Entscheidungen im Management und in den Fachbereichen


Ihr Profil


Sie verfügen über eine Promotion (PhD) in einem quantitativen Fachgebiet (z. B. Data Science, Statistik, Physik, Ingenieurwissenschaften, Informatik) oder einen Master-Abschluss mit ca. 3-5 Jahren einschlägiger Berufserfahrung im Bereich Data Science
Sie überzeugen durch Ihre Kommunikation: Sie präsentieren komplexe Analysen klar und wirkungsvoll, machen Ergebnisse für unterschiedliche Zielgruppen greifbar und gewinnen Management wie Fachexperten für datengetriebene Lösungen
Sie bringen fundierte Kenntnisse in Statistik, Datenanalyse und Machine Learning mit
Sie haben sehr gute Programmierkenntnisse in Python sowie einen sicheren Umgang mit Git, SQL und Datenbanken
Sie verfügen über sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift
Erfahrung im pharmazeutischen oder industriellen Produktionsumfeld ist von Vorteil


Ihr Benefit

So offen SCHOTT für Ihre Weiterentwicklung ist, so umfangreich ist unser Angebot an zusätzlichen Benefits. Von einem aktiven Gesundheitsmanagement, flexiblen Arbeitszeiten, bis zur betrieblichen Altersvorsorge, alles abgestimmt auf Ihre Ziele und Bedürfnisse.

Entdecken Sie eine besondere Unternehmenskultur, in der alle Personen die Chancen haben, sich zu entfalten.

Bei SCHOTT erwartet Sie eine einzigartige Unternehmenskultur, in der Menschlichkeit, Diversität und Inklusivität großgeschrieben werden. Denn wir wissen: motivierte und engagierte Mitarbeitende sind Voraussetzung für den Erfolg unseres Unternehmens.

Ganzheitliches betriebliches Gesundheitsmanagement; Flexible Arbeitszeiten; Gute Verkehrsanbindung; Kantine

Ihr persönlicher Kontakt

Es erwarten Sie sowohl interessante und herausfordernde Aufgaben in Feldern, die unsere Zukunft beeinflussen, als auch ein motiviertes und nettes Team. Wollen Sie mit uns erfolgreich sein? Dann senden Sie uns Ihre Bewerbung zu: SCHOTT Pharma Schweiz AG, Human Resources, Elina Dominioni


Bei SCHOTT zählt Ihre Persönlichkeit – nicht Geschlecht, Identität oder Herkunft.

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for an AI Engineer based in Switzerland.

As an AI Engineer, you will design, build, and deploy cutting-edge AI solutions that deliver real business value within a modern SaaS environment. Working as part of a collaborative Data & AI team, you will develop production-ready LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and AI-powered workflows while partnering closely with engineering and business stakeholders. This role offers end-to-end ownership across the AI development lifecycle, from problem definition and model implementation to deployment and monitoring. You'll contribute to scalable cloud-based solutions while leveraging the latest AI development tools to accelerate innovation. If you're passionate about applied AI, enjoy solving complex technical challenges, and thrive in a remote, high-autonomy environment, this is an exciting opportunity to shape impactful AI products.

Accountabilities


Design, develop, and deploy production-ready AI solutions using Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and other machine learning techniques.
Own the end-to-end lifecycle of AI features, including problem definition, data preparation, model development, evaluation, deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
Build and maintain scalable AI pipelines for data preprocessing, feature engineering, model inference, and application integration.
Integrate AI capabilities into cloud-based infrastructure while ensuring performance, scalability, reliability, and security.
Collaborate closely with software engineers, product teams, and business stakeholders to embed AI features into customer-facing products and internal systems.
Leverage modern AI-assisted development tools to improve engineering productivity and contribute to AI-driven development best practices.
Identify new opportunities where AI can optimize workflows, enhance products, and generate measurable business impact.


Requirements


Minimum of 3 years of experience in software development, including at least 1 year focused on AI or machine learning engineering.
Proven experience building and deploying LLM-based applications or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions in production environments.
Strong programming skills in Python, with hands-on experience using FastAPI, asynchronous programming, and modern backend development practices.
Practical experience integrating AI solutions into cloud platforms, preferably AWS, with an understanding of scalable distributed systems.
Solid knowledge of database technologies, data processing, algorithm design, statistics, and machine learning fundamentals.
Experience using AI-powered development tools such as Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, or similar within professional engineering workflows.
Familiarity with MLOps concepts, vector databases, semantic search technologies, and AI frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, or equivalent is an advantage.
Strong communication skills, a collaborative mindset, and the ability to work effectively within remote, asynchronous, cross-functional teams.
Self-motivated, curious, and proactive, with a strong sense of ownership and a continuous learning mindset.


Benefits


Competitive salary package.
Full-time remote-first role with flexibility to work from Germany.
Asynchronous working environment that promotes autonomy and work-life balance.
Opportunity to work abroad temporarily while remaining part of the team.
Career development and internal growth opportunities within a rapidly expanding international organization.
Company-provided hardware and equipment to ensure a productive working environment from day one.
Collaborative, diverse, and inclusive international culture focused on innovation and continuous learning.
Opportunity to work with modern AI technologies, cloud platforms, and cutting-edge development tools.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Senior Data Scientist based in Switzerland.

This is an exciting opportunity to join a fast-growing, remote-first environment at the forefront of fraud prevention and financial risk intelligence. In this role, you will leverage advanced analytics, machine learning, and large-scale data to tackle complex fraud challenges with real-world impact. You will work closely with clients and cross-functional teams to design innovative risk solutions, optimize decision-making, and improve product performance. The position combines hands-on technical work with strategic problem-solving and stakeholder collaboration. Ideal for professionals who enjoy turning data into actionable insights, this role offers significant ownership, exposure to cutting-edge technologies, and the opportunity to influence the future of risk management on a global scale.

Accountabilities


Design, build, and deploy machine learning models to identify and prevent fraud across a variety of fintech and risk-related use cases.
Drive a data-first culture by promoting analytical thinking and data-driven decision-making across internal teams and client engagements.
Develop, monitor, and optimize performance metrics to measure the effectiveness of risk strategies and product outcomes.
Conduct advanced analyses to uncover insights that improve fraud prevention, approval rates, and overall customer experience.
Partner directly with clients to understand their fraud challenges and provide clear, actionable recommendations based on data insights.
Build automated dashboards and self-service reporting solutions using business intelligence tools.
Collaborate closely with engineering teams to productionize models, improve scalability, and enhance data infrastructure.
Work cross-functionally with product, business, and engineering stakeholders to translate business requirements into impactful analytical solutions.
Support the development of innovative risk mitigation strategies while balancing security, efficiency, and user experience.


Requirements


7+ years of experience in data science, quantitative modeling, analytics, or related data-focused roles, ideally within fraud prevention, financial risk, or fintech environments.
Strong hands-on expertise in Python and/or R, along with advanced SQL skills for large-scale data analysis.
Experience with machine learning model development, deployment, and performance monitoring in production environments.
Proficiency with BI and visualization tools such as Tableau, Sigma, Metabase, or similar platforms.
Strong analytical skills, including experience with exploratory data analysis, cohort analysis, and extracting insights from complex datasets.
Ability to communicate technical findings effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences, including external stakeholders and clients.
Excellent critical thinking, problem-solving, and decision-making capabilities with a proactive and results-oriented mindset.
Experience collaborating within cross-functional, globally distributed teams.
Familiarity with big data technologies such as Spark is considered an advantage.
Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.


Benefits


Competitive compensation package including cash compensation and equity participation.
Remote-first working environment with the flexibility to work from anywhere.
Flexible paid time off and additional year-end holiday breaks.
Home office setup allowance to support your ideal remote workspace.
Company-provided MacBook Pro and necessary equipment.
Monthly meal allowance and social activity stipend.
Annual health and wellness budget.
Annual learning and professional development stipend.
Opportunity to work alongside world-class professionals in a high-growth international environment.
High levels of autonomy, ownership, and flexibility with a strong focus on results rather than hours worked.
Inclusive and supportive culture that values work-life balance and personal well-being.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Staff Python Engineer, Document App Track
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Staff Python Engineer, Document App Track based in Switzerland.

This is a senior engineering leadership role focused on evolving the core document capabilities of a modern SaaS platform.

You will join a team responsible for building and scaling critical systems that power document creation, editing, and management experiences.

The role combines hands-on Python development with technical strategy, architecture evolution, and cross-team collaboration.

You will influence engineering practices, improve reliability, and help shape how teams build through AI-driven workflows.

This opportunity is ideal for an experienced engineer who enjoys solving complex technical challenges while mentoring others.

You will play a key role in defining long-term platform direction and delivering scalable solutions that impact thousands of users.

Accountabilities

As a Staff Python Engineer, you will contribute to the long-term technical evolution of the Document Domain while driving engineering excellence across teams. You will balance product requirements, scalability, reliability, and developer experience to create robust solutions and establish strong technical foundations.


Define and drive the long-term technical strategy for the Document Domain, ensuring scalable architecture and reliable product evolution.
Design, develop, and maintain complex backend systems using Python and modern engineering practices.
Lead initiatives that improve system reliability, performance, maintainability, and developer productivity.
Champion AI-powered development workflows by helping engineers adopt effective tools and practices to improve speed and quality.
Collaborate with multiple engineering teams to align architecture decisions and deliver impactful document capabilities.
Mentor engineers by sharing technical knowledge, providing guidance, and supporting their professional growth.
Identify technical challenges, define strategic plans, and execute initiatives with a one-year horizon.
Improve developer experience through better tooling, engineering standards, monitoring, and operational practices.
Contribute throughout the full development lifecycle, from requirements analysis and implementation to deployment and monitoring.


Requirements

The ideal candidate is an experienced backend engineer with strong Python expertise, deep knowledge of distributed systems, and the ability to influence technical direction across teams. You should be comfortable working on complex platforms, mentoring engineers, and communicating technical concepts clearly.


6+ years of professional software development experience with strong Python expertise.
Extensive hands-on experience building backend applications and scalable software systems.
Strong knowledge of relational databases, including SQL, migrations, query optimization, and data modeling.
Experience with message queues and event-driven architectures using technologies such as RabbitMQ, NATS, or Kafka.
Solid understanding of Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles and asynchronous programming patterns.
Strong familiarity with modern development practices, including deployment processes, monitoring, and production operations.
Experience working with cloud environments, preferably AWS, and containerized infrastructures such as Docker and Kubernetes.
Ability to leverage AI development workflows effectively and use AI tools to improve personal and team productivity.
Proven mentoring experience and ability to support the growth of other engineers.
Strong written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to collaborate across distributed engineering teams.


Benefits


Competitive salary package, with location-based compensation.
For candidates based in Poland, salary ranges from 30,400 PLN to 45,500 PLN gross per month.
Comprehensive healthcare coverage for employees and family members.
Life insurance protection options for employees and family members.
Fitness and wellness benefits through a Multisport Card program.
Onboarding allowance to support work equipment and home office setup.
Additional self-care days beyond standard vacation allowances.
Wellness, learning, and professional development budgets.
Potential opportunities to purchase company stock or receive annual bonuses.
Remote-friendly work environment with a strong focus on collaboration, ownership, and work-life balance.
Opportunity to work on a growing SaaS platform with significant technical challenges and impact.

Title: Junior Data/AI Engineer
Description:
JUNIOR DATA/AI ENGINEER

Fresh out of school, itching to ship real things? Read on.

12-month fixed-term contract - a full year to learn fast, protect real systems, and build a foundation for your career.

Location: Geneva or Lausanne - You choose




About Alpian

We're building the next generation of private banking, digital, personalized, and actually meaningful.

Alpian is the first Swiss digital bank, combining wealth management and everyday banking in a single mobile app. Our mission? Make investing and banking simple, intuitive, and accessible without ever compromising on security, trust, or excellence.

We're a small team of bold thinkers and pragmatic engineers who like solving hard problems for real users, in production. No ivory towers, no endless demos that go nowhere.




Why this role is different

Most junior jobs hand you a ticket queue and a "good luck." Not here.

You'll learn to build AI systems that thousands of real customers actually use, not toy chatbots, but agents and data pipelines running in a regulated Swiss bank. You'll sit at the intersection of LLMs, analytics, and cloud infrastructure, mentored by people who've taken AI from proof-of-concept to production (and lived to tell the war stories).

If you graduated recently and you're the kind of person who breaks things to understand them, debugs your own code before asking for the answer, and gets a little too excited about a clean data model , you'll feel right at home.




The AI part

Here's the deal: you're joining at the exact moment AI stops being hype and starts being infrastructure.

You'll help us build agents that reason over financial data, RAG pipelines that actually ground their answers, and LLM systems that have to be correct, explainable, and auditable, because "the model said so" doesn't fly when a regulator asks.

You won't just use AI. You'll learn to make it trustworthy. That's the rare skill, and it's the one that will define your career.




What you'll be doing

You'll grow into this, we don't expect all of it on day one:

Write clean, tested Python that ends up in production (not in a drawer)
Help build agentic workflows: tool calling, retries, handling the inevitable failures
Work on RAG pipelines, chunking, embeddings, retrieval that actually retrieves the right thing
Query and model data in BigQuery, and learn why analytical correctness matters
Add the unglamorous-but-critical stuff: tracing, evaluations, cost and latency monitoring
Learn to handle customer data the right way, PII, access control, auditability
Document what you build and explain your trade-offs clearly (bonus points for zero buzzwords)




What we're looking for

We're hiring for potential and attitude, not a decade of experience.

A recent degree in Computer Science, Data, Engineering, or a related field (or a self-taught path that proves you can build)
Solid Python foundations, you've written real programs, not just notebook snippets
Genuine curiosity about AI, LLMs, and data, some hands-on tinkering (projects, internships, hackathons, side projects) counts a lot
Comfort with SQL, or eagerness to get there fast
The instinct to debug your own code and figure things out before reaching for help
Clear communication and the humility to ask good questions
You care about why something works, not just that it works




Nice to have (truly optional)

A personal project involving an LLM, an API, or a dataset you found interesting
Any exposure to Google Cloud, containers, or Git workflows
A hackathon, open-source contribution, or that one weekend project you can't stop talking about
Curiosity about regulated environments and why "move fast and break things" doesn't always apply to banks




Our stack

Google ADK · Vertex AI · BigQuery · Grafana · Python (async, APIs, testing) · vector databases & embedding models · GCP · CI/CD, containers, IAM, secrets management

Don't know all of these? Neither did we, once. You'll learn them here.




What you'll get

Real ownership of real systems, early
Mentorship from senior engineers who actually want to teach
A front-row seat to production AI in a domain where the stakes are real
A small, ambitious team where your work is visible and your ideas count







Ready to build the future of banking? We'd love to see what you've made, projects, repos, and enthusiasm welcome alongside your CV.

Title: Educateur-trice diplômé-e / Foyer de l'Aubépine
Description:
Description de l'entreprise

La Fondation Officielle de la Jeunesse (FOJ) poursuit l’objectif de favoriser le développement psycho-social des enfants, adolescents et jeunes en difficulté, en collaboration avec les parents et les institutions partenaires. Liée par un contrat de prestations avec l’Etat de Genève, la FOJ s’inscrit dans la protection et la défense des intérêts de l’enfant.

Au service des familles du canton, elle œuvre à travers quatre champs d’action principaux: l’aide à l’enfance, l’accueil d’urgence, le soutien aux familles et la préparation à l’autonomie.

Pour répondre à sa mission, l’institution gère 47 structures réparties sur le Canton de Genève. Elle dispose de plus de 500 places d’accueil pour des mineurs et jeunes adultes, et propose également des prestations éducatives ambulatoires à domicile. La FOJ compte aujourd’hui 670 collaborateurs engagés au service des jeunes et de leurs familles.

Pour mener à bien sa mission, la FOJ recherche un-e éducateur-trice diplômé-e pour le Foyer de l'Aubépine qui accueille, de jour comme de nuit, quatre jeunes de 12 à 18 ans présentant une problématique psychiatrique importante, et assure un suivi des soins au travers de prestations thérapeutiques et éducatives adaptées.

Description du poste


Assurer l’accompagnement et le soutien éducatif au sein d’une équipe pluridisciplinaire, auprès d’adolescents âgés de 12 à 18 ans vivant en foyer
Préparer les jeunes à l’autonomie en les accompagnant dans les apprentissages du quotidien, la prise progressive de responsabilités et leur insertion
Être ouvert à la pédagogie du lien du développement et établir une relation éducative fondée sur la confiance, la régulation émotionnelle et la valorisation du potentiel de chaque jeune
Collaborer étroitement avec les services placeurs et les familles
Participer activement aux colloques d’équipe, aux réunions de réseau et aux supervisions.

Description de l'entreprise

La Fondation Officielle de la Jeunesse (FOJ) poursuit l’objectif de favoriser le développement psycho-social des enfants, adolescents et jeunes en difficulté, en collaboration avec les parents et les institutions partenaires. Liée par un contrat de prestations avec l’Etat de Genève, la FOJ s’inscrit dans la protection et la défense des intérêts de l’enfant.

Au service des familles du canton, elle œuvre à travers quatre champs d’action principaux: l’aide à l’enfance, l’accueil d’urgence, le soutien aux familles et la préparation à l’autonomie.

Pour répondre à sa mission, l’institution gère 47 structures réparties sur le Canton de Genève. Elle dispose de plus de 500 places d’accueil pour des mineurs et jeunes adultes, et propose également des prestations éducatives ambulatoires à domicile. La FOJ compte aujourd’hui 670 collaborateurs engagés au service des jeunes et de leurs familles.

Pour mener à bien sa mission, la FOJ recherche un-e éducateur-trice diplômé-e pour le Foyer de l'Aubépine qui accueille, de jour comme de nuit, quatre jeunes de 12 à 18 ans présentant une problématique psychiatrique importante, et assure un suivi des soins au travers de prestations thérapeutiques et éducatives adaptées.

Description du poste

  • Assurer l’accompagnement et le soutien éducatif au sein d’une équipe pluridisciplinaire, auprès d’adolescents âgés de 12 à 18 ans vivant en foyer
  • Préparer les jeunes à l’autonomie en les accompagnant dans les apprentissages du quotidien, la prise progressive de responsabilités et leur insertion
  • Être ouvert à la pédagogie du lien du développement et établir une relation éducative fondée sur la confiance, la régulation émotionnelle et la valorisation du potentiel de chaque jeune
  • Collaborer étroitement avec les services placeurs et les familles

AI Engineer

(all genders)

Workload: 60 - 100%

Location: Hybrid / Switzerland

Job Description

About us

dreamleap is a Swiss Agentic AI platform that, through deeply integrated AI in business processes, is redefining how regulated SMEs will work in the future. We develop solutions that enable companies to intelligently leverage their data, documents, and processes - securely, efficiently, and responsibly.

In addition to our platform, we support companies with hands-on training and strategic consulting to prepare their employees for an AI-driven future.

To support our continued growth, we are looking for you as AI Engineer, who enjoys client interaction and product development, and is eager to dive deeper into business processes and AI use cases.

Your Role

As an AI / Software Engineer, you will be an integral part of our creative team, contributing to the development of next-generation AI solutions. You will have the chance to enhance your software development skills and gain valuable experience in the fast-paced startup environment.

Your Responsibilities


Software Development: Contribute to the development and optimization of our software products using Python and Azure OpenAI.
Assist in the development of the NextJS frontend if you have an interest in full-stack engineering.
Feature Development: Conceptualize and implement new functionalities.
AI Training Support: Aid in highly technical trainings and deployment of AI & ML models.


Your Profile


Bachelor's degree: In Computer Science or AI, Information Technology, or experience in a related field.
Technical Skills: Strong proficiency in Python; familiarity with AI and machine learning concepts is a plus.
Passion for AI: A deep interest in AI technologies and eagerness to contribute to innovative projects.
Quick Learner: Ability to quickly adapt and contribute to ongoing projects.
Team Player: Collaborative mindset with a strong drive to achieve common goals.
Explorer: You constantly learn, try out tools, and are happy to share your thoughts, learnings with others.


What we offer you


Cutting-Edge AI Technologies: Work with the latest in AI and LLM language generation technologies.
Project Involvement: Participate in projects for renowned companies, from conception to deployment.
Professional Growth: Continuous learning opportunities and exchanges with leading AI experts.
Network Expansion: Grow your professional network within the AI and tech community.
Collaboration: Work closely with the founders and seasoned engineers.
Work-Life Balance: Flexible working hours and the option to work fully remotely.
Career Development: Clear paths for career progression within the company.
Startup Experience: Learn from serial founders, advisors, entrepreneurs that have build companies


What happens next

Does this sound like you?

Just send us your CV or LinkedIn link and a few lines about why dreamleap and AI Engineering appeal to you.

We look forward to meeting you soon. 🚀

Title: Head of AI
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Head of AI based in Switzerland.

Join an ambitious engineering organization building next-generation AI systems that solve complex real-world cybersecurity challenges at scale. This is a rare opportunity for a hands-on technical leader to define AI strategy while remaining deeply involved in research, experimentation, and production development. You'll work alongside experienced engineering leaders to advance cutting-edge LLMs, autonomous agents, and evaluation frameworks that directly influence the company's competitive advantage. The role combines technical innovation, strategic decision-making, and product ownership in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where rapid iteration and measurable impact are valued. If you're passionate about agentic AI, production-grade machine learning, and solving problems that few organizations have tackled successfully, this position offers exceptional ownership and influence.

Accountabilities


Define and drive the company's AI research strategy, identifying emerging technologies and translating them into a practical product roadmap.
Lead the development of advanced evaluation frameworks for autonomous AI agents, measuring performance across complex, non-deterministic workflows and continuously improving model quality.
Design, prototype, and deploy innovative AI capabilities, moving rapidly from experimentation to production-ready solutions.
Own fine-tuning pipelines, model selection, routing strategies, context engineering, and inference optimization using production data.
Guide technical priorities across a high-performing AI engineering team, evaluating new research, frameworks, and methodologies based on business value and technical feasibility.
Lead by example through active software development, architecture decisions, technical mentoring, code reviews, and collaborative problem-solving.
Partner closely with engineering leadership, product teams, and customers to align AI capabilities with business needs and real-world security challenges.
Continuously improve AI performance, scalability, cost efficiency, and production reliability while establishing long-term technical standards.


Requirements


Proven experience leading AI initiatives while remaining deeply involved in hands-on software development and technical execution.
Demonstrated success designing, deploying, and maintaining production-grade LLM or agentic AI systems used by real customers.
Deep understanding of transformer architectures, fine-tuning techniques (including approaches such as LoRA), inference optimization, and modern generative AI methodologies.
Strong experience building evaluation frameworks for autonomous or non-deterministic AI systems, including trajectory analysis, benchmarking, and model assessment.
Excellent programming skills with experience developing scalable machine learning systems in production environments.
Experience working within fast-paced startup environments, driving projects from concept to deployment with minimal oversight.
Strong technical leadership skills, including mentoring engineers, establishing engineering standards, and influencing cross-functional technical decisions.
Outstanding analytical thinking, problem-solving abilities, and the capacity to make pragmatic decisions balancing innovation, performance, and operational cost.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex AI concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Experience in cybersecurity, vulnerability management, offensive security, or AI-powered security platforms is highly desirable.
Experience optimizing model routing, inference costs, RLHF, or AI evaluation pipelines, along with advanced academic research in machine learning, is considered a strong advantage.


Benefits


Competitive annual salary ranging from £180,000 to £250,000.
Equity package ranging from 0.2% to 0.5%, offering significant long-term ownership potential.
Fully remote role with flexibility to work across Europe while based in the United Kingdom.
Opportunity to shape the AI strategy of a rapidly growing, venture-backed technology company.
Direct influence on product direction as part of the engineering leadership team.
Work alongside experienced engineering leaders with backgrounds in globally recognized technology companies.
Opportunity to tackle some of the most advanced challenges in generative AI, autonomous agents, and cybersecurity.
Strong career growth potential with a pathway toward executive AI leadership as the organization expands.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Data Scientist – Analyst
Description:
Job Description

Role Purpose

The Data Scientist will be responsible for extracting actionable insights from complex data sets to support data-driven decision-making across the organization. This role will design, develop, and implement advanced analytical models and machine learning solutions to solve business challenges, optimize processes, and drive growth.

Key Responsibilities


Build, validate, and deploy ML propensity and recommendation models using Databricks.
Develop and maintain robust data pipelines for model training, scoring, and reporting.
Design and execute AB tests for incentives and pricing; analyze results and provide actionable insights.
Collaborate with business to gather requirements and request relevant data.
Work closely with channel teams (OBTM, F2F, Digital) to translate analytics into business actions.
Demonstrate a bias to action by rapidly prototyping and iterating on solutions.
Document methodologies, code, and results for reproducibility and knowledge sharing.


Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
2–3 years of experience in data science, analytics, or related field.
Experience in insurance, banking, or fintech analytics. (Preferred)
Hands-on experience with Databricks for data processing, ML modeling, and experiment management.
Strong Python and SQL skills
Experience designing and analyzing AB tests for incentives and pricing.
Proficiency in building job pipelines in Databricks.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; results-oriented mindset.
Ability to work in a team vs being a personal superstar


Effective communicator, able to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Design and execute AB tests for incentives and pricing; analyze results and provide actionable insights.
  • Collaborate with business to gather requirements and request relevant data.
  • Work closely with channel teams (OBTM, F2F, Digital) to translate analytics into business actions.
  • Demonstrate a bias to action by rapidly prototyping and iterating on solutions.
  • Document methodologies, code, and results for reproducibility and knowledge sharing.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • 2–3 years of experience in data science, analytics, or related field.
  • Experience in insurance, banking, or fintech analytics. (Preferred)
  • Hands-on experience with Databricks for data processing, ML modeling, and experiment management.
  • Strong Python and SQL skills
  • Experience designing and analyzing AB tests for incentives and pricing.
  • Proficiency in building job pipelines in Databricks.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; results-oriented mindset.
  • Ability to work in a team vs being a personal superstar

Effective communicator, able to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Descrição da empresa

Sobre a Syngenta

A Syngenta é líder mundial em inovação agrícola, com operações em mais de 90 países. Nossa missão é capacitar agricultores com tecnologias e práticas avançadas que permitam alimentar a crescente população mundial enquanto preservamos o planeta para as futuras gerações. Nossas descobertas científicas pioneiras proporcionam benefícios superiores aos agricultores e à sociedade em uma escala sem precedentes. Orientados por nossas Prioridades de Sustentabilidade, desenvolvemos continuamente tecnologias e soluções que auxiliam os produtores a cultivar plantas mais saudáveis em solos revitalizados, maximizando a produtividade. A Syngenta Crop Protection está sediada em Basel, Suíça, enquanto a Syngenta Seeds mantém sua sede nos Estados Unidos. Conheça nossas histórias e acompanhe nosso trabalho no LinkedIn, Instagram & X.

Descrição da vaga

Na Syngenta, nosso objetivo é construir a equipe mais colaborativa e confiável na agricultura, fornecendo sementes de alta qualidade e soluções inovadoras de proteção de cultivos que melhorem o sucesso dos agricultores. Para apoiar esta missão, a equipe de Produtos de IA de Vegetais (Vegetables AI Product) da Syngenta está buscando um Data Scientist (Cientista de Dados) com atuação Global. Esta função apoiará a entrega de soluções de IA/ML que transformam o planejamento de demanda, a alocação de estoque e a otimização da cadeia de suprimentos e decisões comerciais.

Responsabilidades


Conduzir análise exploratória de dados (EDA) em conjuntos de dados comerciais e de cadeia de suprimentos (demanda, estoque, pedidos, qualidade, logística, custos de produção, precificação).
Desenvolver, validar e monitorar modelos de machine learning, incluindo previsão de séries temporais, algoritmos de otimização, classificação e agrupamento aplicados a problemas da cadeia de suprimentos agrícola.
Apoiar o design e refinamento de ontologias de grafos de conhecimento e lógica de raciocínio baseada em grafos para confirmação de demanda e alocação de lotes.
Atuar como referência técnica interna junto às equipes de engenharia e entrega, revisando saídas de modelos e garantindo o alinhamento com os requisitos de negócios.
Projetar e implementar frameworks de monitoramento de desempenho de modelos (rastreamento de precisão, detecção de viés e alertas de desvio).
Contribuir para o rastreamento de geração de valor, fornecendo insumos analíticos e quantificação de impacto.
Construir e manter notebooks analíticos, dashboards e documentações que gerem propriedade intelectual interna reutilizável.
Colaborar com Engenheiros de Dados para definir requisitos de dados, validar a qualidade e garantir a integridade dos pipelines de IA.
Parceirizar com o Product Designer para traduzir saídas de modelos em insights acionáveis para planejadores e equipes comerciais.
Apoiar o design de experimentos (backtesting, simulação de cenários, testes A/B) para validar recomendações de IA antes da implantação em produção.
Manter-se atualizado com avanços em ML aplicado, IA de agentes (agentic AI), raciocínio baseado em LLM e tecnologias de grafos de conhecimento.


Qualificações

Exigidas


Graduação ou Mestrado em Ciência de Dados, Estatística, Ciência da Computação, Matemática, Engenharia ou área correlata.
3 a 5 anos de experiência entregando soluções de ciência de dados aplicada em contextos operacionais ou orientados a produtos.
Forte proficiência em Python para ciência de dados (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, statsmodels, matplotlib/plotly).
Experiência com SQL para consultas complexas, transformação e agregação de dados.
Sólido entendimento de algoritmos de machine learning: regressão, classificação, análise de séries temporais (ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM), clustering e métodos de otimização.
Experiência com design de experimentos, técnicas de validação de modelos e testes de hipóteses estatísticas.
Familiaridade com plataformas de dados em nuvem (AWS, Databricks ou similar) e controle de versão (Git).
Excelentes habilidades de comunicação em inglês (escrita e falada), sendo o idioma de trabalho diário.
Experiência de trabalho em equipes multifuncionais ao lado de gerentes de produto, engenheiros e stakeholders de negócios.


Desejadas


Conhecimento prático de LLMs, arquiteturas RAG ou frameworks de IA de agentes (ex: AWS Bedrock, LangChain).
Exposição a grafos de conhecimento, bancos de dados de grafos ou tecnologias semânticas (RDF, SPARQL, property graphs).
Familiaridade com domínios de dados de cadeia de suprimentos (supply chain) ou do setor agrícola.
Forte capacidade de trabalhar de forma autônoma em equipes globais e multiculturais, lidando bem com ambiguidades e cenários em evolução.


Informações adicionais

O que oferecemos


Uma cultura que celebra a diversidade e a inclusão, promove o desenvolvimento profissional e busca um equilíbrio entre vida profissional e pessoal que apoie os membros da equipe. Oferece opções de trabalho flexíveis para atender às suas necessidades profissionais e pessoais.
Pacote de benefícios completo (médico, odontológico e oftalmológico) que começa no seu primeiro dia.
Férias Remuneradas, Licença Maternidade e Paternidade, Auxílio Educação, Programas de Bem-Estar, Descontos Corporativos, entre outros benefícios.


A Syngenta é uma empresa que promove igualdade de oportunidades e não discrimina no recrutamento, contratação, treinamento, promoção ou quaisquer outras práticas de emprego por motivos de raça, cor, religião, sexo, nacionalidade, idade, orientação sexual, estado civil ou veterano, deficiência ou qualquer outro status legalmente protegido.

Title: Data Scientist - Specialist
Description:
Com 125 anos, a Gerdau é a maior empresa brasileira produtora de aço e uma das principais fornecedoras de aços longos e especiais do mundo. No Brasil, também produz aços planos e minério de ferro. Com o propósito de empoderar pessoas que constroem o futuro, é referência de internacionalização no setor industrial do país, está presente em vários países nas Américas e conta com 30 mil colaboradores.

Data Scientist - Specialist é o responsável por desenvolver e implementar soluções analíticas, atuando na preparação de dados, construção de modelos e geração de insights para suportar a tomada de decisão. Esse profissional participa ativamente de projetos de ciência de dados, contribuindo para a evolução das soluções e sua aplicação em escala.

Principais responsabilidades:


Desenvolver e implementar modelos de machine learning.
Traduzir problemas de negócio em análises e soluções orientadas a dados.
Apoiar a escalabilidade e manutenção dos modelos desenvolvidos.
Atuar em conjunto com o time garantindo qualidade e consistência das entregas.
Contribuir na automação e monitoramento de soluções analíticas.


Requisitos técnicos:


Domínio de Python e SQL para análise e manipulação de dados.
Experiência com Databricks (notebooks, workflows).
Conhecimento em estatística aplicada e machine learning (regressão, classificação, ensembles) e otimização.
Experiência com construção de pipelines de dados e modelagem.
Vivência com bancos de dados e otimização de consultas.
Capacidade de construir análises e relatórios de impacto para o negócio.
Conhecimento em tópicos de IA Generetiva e Multiagentes.


Formação e experiência:


Graduação em Engenharia, Matemática, Estatística, Computação ou áreas correlatas.
Inglês Avançado é diferencial.
Experiência com indústria é diferencial.

Na Gerdau, você é o personagem principal! Por isso, estamos sempre nos reinventando para construir o amanhã do seu lado. Valorizamos nossos colaboradores e oferecemos um pacote de benefícios abrangente para promover qualidade de vida e desenvolvimento profissional. Nossos benefícios incluem:


Programa de Benefícios flexíveis, para escolher seus benefícios, selecionando aqueles que melhor se adequam à sua realidade. Tudo em uma plataforma moderna, simples e intuitiva.
Previdência Complementar: Quem começa a pensar agora no futuro pode aproveitar com tranquilidade todas as etapas da vida. Com a Previdência Complementar, você e sua família podem planejar o futuro a partir de contribuições mensais e rentabilidade do plano no longo prazo. https://www.gerdauprevidencia.com.br/
Assistência Médica: Cobertura de saúde adaptada ao Rol da ANS colaboradores e seus dependentes legais.
